历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (including physics category) were approximately 7299, 8067, 7703, and 7490, fluctuating within the 7200–8100 range. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 7490, showing a slight upward trend in recent two years. Enrollment plans: 30 in 2022, 32 in 2023, 26 in 2024, 36 in 2025; for 2026, the physics category plan is 28, a reduction of 8 (-22.2%) compared to 2025, which will intensify competition and push admission rankings forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its ranking in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings has been rising, from 68th in 2021 to 61st in 2026, indicating steadily improving comprehensive strength and reputation, enhancing its appeal to candidates. In 2026, reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to campus food delivery management disputes, but the incident is neutral overall with limited impact. Douyin popularity ranks 38th (relatively hot), with comprehensive popularity around 1.2 million, indicating above-average attention on short video platforms and reflecting considerable application enthusiasm. Psychology (A), Education (A), and Marxist Theory (A-) are all A-level disciplines, prominent among normal universities. Engineering majors like Intelligent Science and Technology, Electrical Engineering and Automation align closely with popular fields such as electronic information/communication and electrical engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors like Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication are highly recommended with strong application willingness. In 2026, the number of physics category candidates in the province is about 44,550, roughly the same as 2025, maintaining a stable competitive landscape.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant enrollment reduction (-22.2%) in the 2026 physics category, the university's rising ranking, and high major popularity, admission competition in 2026 is expected to intensify markedly compared to 2025, with rankings moving forward. Predicted minimum ranking: approximately 6461, with a range of 5961–6961.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range (5961–6961), prioritize Tier 2 majors as the main choices, with 1–2 Tier 1 majors (Intelligent Science and Technology, Electrical Engineering and Automation) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors as safety choices. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit (<5961), focus on Tier 1 flagship engineering majors; if near the lower limit (>6961), mainly choose Tier 3 majors and be cautious with Tier 1. Majors at Rongchang Campus typically have lower admission rankings than similar ones at the main campus, making them a stable option.
